headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Illinois Tool Works, Lowers Price Target to $295
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tami Zakaria   maintains Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $303 to $295.
